title: Planning approved: 4-unit Permission In Principle To Establish The Principle Of Residential Development  in Chelmsford
excerpt: Chelmsford City Council has approved 4 residential units at Land At Margaretting Service Station Main Road Margaretting Ingatestone Essex. Local sold-price evidence indicates a median price of £400,000; high-level 70% LTGDV senior debt would be approximately £1,120,000.
body:
## Chelmsford planning approval

Chelmsford City Council has approved planning application 26/00589/PIP for 4 residential units at Land At Margaretting Service Station Main Road Margaretting Ingatestone Essex. The approved proposal is: Permission In Principle To Establish The Principle Of Residential Development For Four Dwellings

The application was decided on 17/06/2026. Construction Capital has reviewed the local market data for Chelmsford, Essex to provide a high-level funding view for the site.

## Local sold-price evidence

HM Land Registry sold-price data for Chelmsford shows a median residential sale price of £400,000 across 1,944 transactions in the last 12 months. The year-on-year price movement is +0.2%.

| Recent local sale | Price | Date | Type |
|---|---:|---|---|
| 68, FORTINBRAS WAY | £465,000 | 2026-03-30 | D |
| 12, SHELDRICK LINK | £535,000 | 2026-03-27 | D |
| 24, LITTLE MEADOW | £370,000 | 2026-03-25 | T |
| 5, JOHN EVE AVENUE | £600,000 | 2026-03-24 | S |
| 178, WATSON HEIGHTS | £295,000 | 2026-03-23 | F |

## High-level indicative development finance

Using the available planning and sold-price data, the scheme has an estimated GDV of £1,600,000. At 70% LTGDV, that implies a high-level indicative senior debt facility of approximately £1,120,000.

This is not a credit-backed offer and remains subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience, planning documentation, lender appetite, and full underwriting. For a live scheme, Construction Capital can approach the lender panel and provide formal indicative terms within 24 hours.

## Speak to Construction Capital

Construction Capital arranges senior debt, mezzanine finance, bridging loans and equity/JV funding for UK property developers. If you are progressing this site or a similar consented scheme, submit the details through the deal room and we will come back with lender options.
author: Matt Lenzie

data_sources.label: HM Land Registry sold-price data - Chelmsford
